creator: rmiya@cc.hirosaki-u.ac.jp
text:
Ports tarballs of biology/mopac and biology/psi88 cannot be obtained 
from WWW pages of http://www.freebsd.org/ports/biology.html, etc.

Fix: 

The ports of biology/mopac and biology/psi88 were changed their 
category from misc to biology in a few weeks ago.  
But, descriptions and links in biology.html and misc.html were not 
changed.
